response.justification: Maria is a technically accomplished engineer with 17 years of continuous software development and demonstrated expertise across web, mobile, and embedded systems. However, this role is explicitly a 'full-time people-leadership role' requiring 2+ years of people management experience, and her resume shows no evidence of team leadership, hiring, performance reviews, or people development—critical gaps for a management position. While her developer tools passion is evident through open-source projects and training initiatives, her professional experience in this domain is fragmented (6 months at NI, 2 years infrastructure work, 2 months current role) rather than the preferred 3-year depth required.
strengths: Exceptional technical breadth and shipping track record: 17+ years across web, mobile, embedded systems with proven ability to deliver at scale (Apple TV app ranked top-10 in US, direct mail platform handling millions)

Genuine passion for engineering productivity and quality: Created multiple open-source testing frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), organized recurring code quality initiatives (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses, Testing workshops)
Recent alignment with developer tooling: Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing active engagement with the productivity ecosystem
concerns: No demonstrated people management experience: Resume contains no evidence of managing teams, hiring, conducting performance reviews, one-on-ones, or developing engineers—core requirements for a management role

Fragmented developer tools/build systems depth: Professional experience spans 6 months (NI LabWindows), 2 years (GitLab/CI infrastructure at Altom), and 2 months (current MCP work) versus the 3-year minimum preference

No evidence of organizational leadership or change management: No mention of cross-team initiatives, scaling decisions, technical roadmap ownership, or driving strategic direction across multiple teams

key_factors.factor: Strong technical foundation and execution ability
